item.title: Challenges in Building PaaS on AWS
item.description: A deep dive into the non-technical and technical challenges encountered when building a Platform-as-a-Service on AWS — from hiring and team structure to distributed systems problems.

item.title: Modeling Shared Entities Across Bounded Contexts in Domain-Driven Design
item.description: How to handle shared concepts like Customer across multiple bounded contexts in DDD — with separate models, domain events, and integration patterns.

item.title: A Socio-Technical Maturity Model for Large-Scale Event-Driven Architectural Systems
item.description: A comprehensive EDA maturity model for enterprise-scale systems covering engineering roles, DDD alignment, team evolution, and hiring strategies — structured as the 4A Model: Awaken, Align, Amplify, Automate.

item.title: Guidance Framework for Internal Developer Portal Work Prioritization and Measuring Success
item.description: How do technical professionals determine the capabilities of an internal developer portal, prioritize the work and measure success?

item.title: Setup Business Metrics with Amazon CloudWatch and AWS Lambda at Lower Cost
item.description: A practical guide to creating custom business metrics in Amazon CloudWatch using the Embedded Metric Format (EMF) with AWS Lambda — up to 65% cheaper than the PutMetricData API.

item.title: AWS Architecture Diagrams Guidelines
item.description: Practical guidelines for drawing meaningful AWS architectural diagrams — covering logical views, physical/deployment views, and common pitfalls to avoid.

item.title: Time Dimension in Distributed Systems
item.description: Why time is the trickiest problem in distributed systems — from wall clocks and NTP drift to Lamport timestamps and vector clocks.

item.title: Why We Need Distributed Systems
item.description: This post explains why we need distributed systems and their commonplace
